title: U.S. Said to Have Sent Iran a 15-Point Plan to End the Middle East War
summary_full: The 15-point plan was delivered via Pakistan, whose army chief has emerged as the key interlocutor between the United States and Iran, officials say.
summary_public: The 15-point plan was delivered via Pakistan, whose army chief has emerged as the key interlocutor between the United States and Iran, officials say.
